prompt: Two images are provided. IMAGE 1 is a scene: a woman standing in a Milos lane wearing a navy-and-white pinstripe tiered maxi dress. CRITICAL PROPORTIONS: keep the head at EXACTLY the same size, scale and position as the head already in IMAGE 1. Do NOT enlarge the head or the hair. Keep the navy pinstripe dress and every stripe/gather/tier/hem, her body, pose, hands, sandals, the Milos setting, and the warm late-afternoon light and shadows all identical. Photorealistic.
